touches.ai_summary: Initial cold outreach to Amanda Nkrumah at CoralEdge. Rep introduced AskElephant's conversation intelligence platform. Amanda expressed interest in improving sales rep productivity and agreed to a qualification call.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently using any conversation intelligence tools?
questions_asked.answer: We've been looking at a few options including Chorus, but haven't made a decision yet.

next_steps: Schedule qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Amanda to understand CoralEdge's sales process and pain points. Team of 7 reps struggling with coaching consistency and call review efficiency. Amanda mentioned they're in active evaluation with Chorus. Confirmed budget range and decision timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the need for conversation intelligence right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our sales team has grown quickly and managers can't keep up with call reviews. We need better coaching at scale.

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Chorus?
questions_asked.answer: We're competitive on per-seat pricing and include unlimited automation in our core tier, which Chorus charges extra for.

questions_asked.question: Who else would be involved in evaluating this beyond yourself?
questions_asked.answer: Scarlett Sanchez on my team will handle the technical evaluation and integration requirements.

next_steps: Send ROI calculator and case studies

touches.ai_summary: Comprehensive discovery call with Amanda covering current workflow, integration needs with Salesforce, and specific automation requirements. Discussed rep onboarding challenges and how automated call summaries could reduce manager overhead. Amanda confirmed 7 licenses needed and expressed strong interest in unlimited automation feature. Competitive pressure from Chorus acknowledged but Amanda sees value in AskElephant's automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Can you walk through how the automated call summaries actually work?
questions_asked.answer: Our AI processes calls in real-time, extracting key topics, questions, objections, and next steps. Summaries are pushed to Salesforce within minutes of call completion.

questions_asked.question: What specific automations would be most valuable for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Automatic CRM updates are huge for us. Our reps spend too much time on manual data entry after calls.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: For a team your size with Salesforce integration, typically 1-2 weeks from contract signature to full rollout.

questions_asked.question: What's your decision timeline and process from here?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to make a decision by end of month. I'll need to get Scarlett's sign-off on the technical side and then we'll move forward.

objections: We're also evaluating Chorus and they have strong brand recognition in our industry.
next_steps: Set up technical review session with Scarlett Sanchez

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Amanda with formal proposal for 7 seats at $6,500 ACV including unlimited automation tier. Attached ROI analysis showing estimated 8-hour monthly time savings per manager. Referenced technical review session scheduled with Scarlett for next week.

questions_asked.question: Can you clarify what's included in the unlimited automation tier versus your basic plan?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited tier includes automated CRM sync, custom workflow triggers, and AI-generated follow-up email drafts. Basic tier only includes call transcription and manual summary review.

next_steps: Discuss with finance on budget allocation

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking in on proposal review and Scarlett's technical evaluation. Amanda confirmed technical requirements are met but mentioned they're finalizing comparison with Chorus. Discussed contract terms and confirmed no additional discount needed at current pricing. Amanda indicated decision expected within one week.
next_steps: Final decision expected by end of week
Amanda to confirm if any additional stakeholder meetings needed
